---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation, not the
solution.

## Proposed solution

How you think luplo could solve it. Sketch the CLI command, MCP tool,
or API shape if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you looked at and why they don't fit.

## Scope

Is this Local-only, Remote-only, or both? Does it affect the schema,
the CLI, the MCP surface, or the HTTP routes?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or existing luplo
items/decisions if you have them.
